headline: india viral: moon mission success, bcci naman awards & ayodhya record! 🇮🇳
hook_text: india is breaking records today! from the historic lunar landing success to the glitz of the cricket world's biggest night and a massive celebration in ayodhya — here are the top 3 stories everyone is talking about! 🚀🏏✨

scenes.headline: isro's chandrayaan-4 touches down! 🚀
scenes.details: india has made history again as the chandrayaan-4 lander successfully touched down on the moon's south pole today. isro confirms that the sample return mission is functioning perfectly, making india one of the elite few to bring lunar soil back to earth.
scenes.search_key: isro chandrayaan-4 landing | moon south pole mission
scenes.hook_text: is india now the world leader in space exploration?

scenes.headline: naman awards: virat's emotional tribute! 👑
scenes.details: at the bcci naman awards in delhi tonight, virat kohli went viral after giving an emotional speech dedicated to his journey and his family. the video of his standing ovation has already crossed millions of views on social media within an hour of the ceremony.
scenes.search_key: virat kohli naman awards speech | bcci awards delhi 2026
scenes.hook_text: is this the most emotional moment in indian cricket history?

scenes.headline: ayodhya sets new world record! 🪔
scenes.details: the city of ayodhya has broken its own guinness world record during the spring festival today. over 3 million eco-friendly lamps were lit simultaneously along the sarayu river, creating a stunning visual that is trending globally across all social platforms.
scenes.search_key: ayodhya world record 2026 | sarayu river deepotsav viral
scenes.hook_text: can any other city in the world match this spectacle?

scenes.headline: subscribe for india's top trends! 🔔
scenes.details: don't miss a single beat of what's trending in india. stay updated with trendwave now for daily news on tech, cricket, and viral moments. tune with us for more such news and subscribe to find out more!

subscribe_hook: subscribe to trendwave now for your daily fix of cricket and bollywood trends! 🌊🎥

checklist.english_only_reminder: this script is in english only.
